name: @visuelconcept/wui-tag-importer
description: Tag Importer — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page: import device tags into datapoint types + datapoints from an OPC UA NodeSet2 XML file (mutualising repeated node instances into one DPType) or by browsing a live OPC UA server (a selected instance's subtree becomes the DPType). Protocol-agnostic core with pluggable source adapters (OPC UA today, extensible). Online import also writes the peripheral address configs. Engineering ops via the /api/tag-importer API.
